evidence_label: case-001 first quote request table, not medical advice
quote_scope: public-safe preclinical assay quote draft only; not contact permission, treatment validation, patient-sample permission, or patient-specific action

source_checks.source_label: June 1 first quote panel assay readiness audit
source_checks.source_role: Separates first quote items into benchmark-only, assay-ready, and held states.
Requires identity, model, controls, endpoints, stop rules, raw data, and privacy boundaries before quote movement.
Keeps raw records, identifiers, exact private dates, and patient-specific action out of public artifacts.
Checked current compound identity pages for hydroxyurea, resveratrol, sirolimus, melittin, and PF-06409577.
Current AMPK beta1 / PF-06409577 HbF mechanism source; use only as expansion-probe evidence, not beta-thalassemia clinical evidence.
Hemolysis assay optimization source for mature red-cell cytotoxicity screening.

included_quote_items.material_requirement: lab-standard comparator with identity and vehicle documented
included_quote_items.stop_condition: Do not frame as a new cure candidate or patient-specific option.

included_quote_items.material_requirement: purified compound with supplier, batch, purity, certificate of analysis if available, and vehicle documented
requested_model_readouts: HbF protein or F-cell percentage if available
mature red-cell hemolysis or membrane damage
alpha/non-alpha or free alpha-globin context if available
included_quote_items.stop_condition: Hold or reject if identity, viability, hemolysis, or maturation boundaries fail.

included_quote_items.material_requirement: exact compound identity, supplier, batch, purity, and vehicle documented
requested_model_readouts: autophagy readout such as ULK1, p62/SQSTM1, or lab-validated equivalent
mature red-cell hemolysis or membrane damage
included_quote_items.stop_condition: Hold or reject if immune-active comparator status is blurred into patient-facing therapy language.

included_quote_items.material_requirement: use only if the lab accepts it as a hazard-calibration control and documents biosafety handling
requested_model_readouts: mature red-cell hemolysis or membrane damage
included_quote_items.stop_condition: Exclude if the lab cannot safely handle it or if it risks therapy framing.

included_quote_items.material_requirement: exact PF-06409577 identity, supplier, batch, purity, and vehicle documented
requested_model_readouts: AMPK beta1 or downstream target-engagement readout if available
autophagy readout such as ULK1, p62/SQSTM1, or lab-validated equivalent
mature red-cell hemolysis or membrane damage
included_quote_items.stop_condition: Keep expansion-only unless the lab can support AMPK beta1 and autophagy context without patient-facing claims.

held_out_items.reason: extract standardization, marker assay, batch controls, and support-only endpoint wording are not ready enough for first quote
exact structure, procurement identity, and batch control remain unresolved for this quote

requested_lab_capabilities: HUDEP2, endogenous HbF reporter, CD34+ erythroid differentiation, beta-thalassemia/HbE cells, or another explicitly validated erythroid model
HbF protein or F-cell percentage if available
erythroid maturation markers such as CD71 and CD235a
mature red-cell hemolysis or membrane damage
alpha/non-alpha globin balance or free alpha-globin burden if available
autophagy readouts for sirolimus and PF-06409577 if available
decision_rule: This table can be used only as a public-safe preclinical quote request draft. It does not authorize outreach, treatment validation, patient sample use, dosing, trial screening, travel, import, or patient-specific action.
